keys.description: signs the per-request token; unset, every request would 500 — so the boot refuses instead (P18)
an in-code dial no deploy surface plumbs (targets: [])
the STT endpoint spawned bots transcribe against
the STT bearer token (must match the STT unit's API_TOKEN)
mounted-subscription credential path — a DOCKER-HOST path (either path suffices — mode: any)

stt.when_unconfigured: POST /bots with transcribe_enabled=true answers a typed 503 naming the unset key(s); bots join+capture but never transcribe

model_inference.description: workers get WORKING model-provider credentials brokered in
model_inference.when_unconfigured: agent turns fail with a provider auth error at dispatch time

surface_only.reason: set by compose historically; the service never reads it — documented drift, candidate for a deploy-surface cleanup
